data.title: Musk Kicked In More Than a Quarter-Billion Dollars To Trump and GOP
data.description: Billionaire Elon Musk reportedly donated a whopping $277 million to support President-elect Donald Trump and other Republican candidates in the 2024 elections.

data.title: Can Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin, Shiba Inu or Solana Beat XRP In 2025? Poll Says Yes, One Coin Stands Out
data.description: The prices of cryptocurrencies have soared in 2024, specifically hitting huge gains and some hitting new all-time highs shortly after the 2024 presidential election.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Compares Trump's FBI Pick, Kash Patel, To Matt Gaetz
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, former White House communications director, on Monday drew parallels between President-elect Donald Trump's nomination of Kash Patel for FBI director and Matt Gaetz's unsuccessful bid for attorney general.

data.title: Most Visited Wikipedia Pages In 2024: Trump, Harris, Musk, Swift, Politics And Netflix Dominate List
data.description: Wikipedia has released a list of the top 25 visited pages in 2024. A look at the list and trends like politics and entertainment dominating the list.

data.title: Bernie Sanders Says Democratic Party Isn't Fighting For The Average Worker, Hasn't Raised The Minimum Wage To A Living Wage For 20M People
